summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MEDUCA format implementation for English Teachers Planner. All 22 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all 6 Theme Planner sections and Lesson Planner format with 6 stages. Fixed a backend bug where pregenerated planners were missing required fields (grade, cefr_level, scenario, theme, week_range, learning_sequence).
passed_tests: ✓ PreviewPage Theme Planner: Section 1 General Information with MEDUCA format
✓ PreviewPage Theme Planner: Section 2 Standards with 3-column table (Skills, Specific Standards, Learning Outcomes)
✓ PreviewPage Theme Planner: Section 3 Communicative Competences with 3-column layout (Linguistic/Pragmatic/Sociolinguistic)
✓ PreviewPage Theme Planner: Section 4 Specific Objectives
✓ PreviewPage Theme Planner: Section 5 Materials and Teaching Strategies
✓ PreviewPage Theme Planner: Section 6 Learning Sequence with Date column
✓ PreviewPage Lesson Planner: MEDUCA header (GOBIERNO NACIONAL, MINISTERIO DE EDUCACIÓN)
✓ PreviewPage Lesson Planner: 5 lessons (Listening, Reading, Speaking, Writing, Mediation)
✓ PreviewPage Lesson Planner: Six Action-oriented Approach Stages with 'Estimated Date and Time' column
✓ PreviewPage Lesson Planner: Comments and Observations section (Homework, Formative Assessment, Teacher's Comments)
✓ Export Word: Generates valid DOCX file (~45KB)
✓ Backend API: All 22 pytest tests passed
✓ MEDUCA fields passed from HomePage to PreviewPage correctly
✓ General Information shows: Teacher, Grade, CEFR Level, Trimester, Weekly Hours, Weeks, Scenario, Theme
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Grade 1 data for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All MEDUCA format features are working correctly: 1) New teacher info fields in HomePage (teacherName, trimester, weeklyHours, weekFrom, weekTo), 2) PreviewPage shows all 6 Theme Planner sections with official MEDUCA format, 3) Lesson Planners show 6 Action-oriented Approach stages with time column, 4) DOCX export generates valid Word document with MEDUCA format. Fixed bug in server.py where pregenerated planners were missing required fields.

features_verified.homepage_teacher_fields: PASS - All 5 new fields working (teacherName, trimester, weeklyHours, weekFrom, weekTo)
features_verified.theme_planner_6_sections: PASS - All 6 sections present and formatted correctly
features_verified.standards_3_column_table: PASS - Skills, Specific Standards, Learning Outcomes columns
features_verified.lesson_planner_meduca_header: PASS - GOBIERNO NACIONAL, MINISTERIO DE EDUCACIÓN header
features_verified.lesson_planner_6_stages: PASS - All 6 Action-oriented Approach stages with time column
features_verified.lesson_planner_comments_section: PASS - Homework, Formative Assessment, Teacher's Comments
features_verified.docx_export: PASS - Valid DOCX file generated with MEDUCA format

bug_fixed.description: Pregenerated planners were missing required fields in general_information and learning_sequence
bug_fixed.fix: Added all required fields (grade, cefr_level, scenario, theme, week_range, learning_sequence) when using pregenerated planners
